description: The Cloud Technical Lead is responsible for defining and leading cloud architecture, migration, and optimization strategies across applications and infrastructure.
responsibilities: Design and govern cloud architecture across platforms
Lead cloud migration and modernization initiatives
Define cloud security, networking, and cost-optimization standards
Collaborate with development, DevOps, and security teams
Ensure high availability, scalability, and disaster recovery
Mentor cloud engineers and review designs

skills.name: Cloud networking, IAM, and security best practices
